SEC.105: APPROPRIATIONS/AUTHORITY UNDER THIS ACT COVER ALL OBLIGATIONS/EXPENDITURES FOR ANY PROJECT/ACTIVITY DURING AVAILABILITY-PERIOD  
SEC.106: APPR/FUNDS/AUTH UNDER THIS ACT AVAILABLE UNTIL FIRST-OF(  
  ENACTMENT OF APPROPRIATION FOR ANY PROJECT/ACTIVITY;  
  ENACTMENT OF FY2025 APPROPRIATIONS ACT WITHOUT PROVISION FOR SUCH PROJECT/ACTIVITY;  
  DATE:2024-12-20  
)  
SEC.107: EXPENDITURES UNDER THIS ACT CHARGED TO APPLICABLE APPROPRIATION/FUND/AUTHORIZATION WHEN CORRESPONDING BILL ENACTS INTO LAW  
SEC.108: APPR/FUNDS/AUTH UNDER THIS ACT IGNORE TIME-LIMITS FOR APPORTIONMENTS(31U.S.C.1513) ∧ ¬WAIVE OTHER APPORTIONMENT-LAWS  
SEC.109: EXCEPT SEC.106: PREVENT HIGH INITIAL OPERATION RATES OR FULL DISTRIBUTION AT FY2025 START ∧ NO GRANTS IMPINGE FINAL-FUNDING-PREROGATIVES  
SEC.110: IMPLEMENT THIS ACT USING MOST-LIMITED-FUNDING ACTION NECESSARY FOR CONTINUATION OF PROJECTS/ACTIVITIES  
SEC.111(a): ENTITLEMENTS/MANDATORY-PAYMENTS(FY2024 BA) ∧ FOOD/NUTRITION-ACT2008 ACTIVITIES CONTINUE AT CURRENT-LAW RATES UNDER FY2024 APPROPRIATIONS ACT CONDITIONS THROUGH DATE:2024-12-20  
SEC.111(b): NOTWITHSTANDING SEC.106: MANDATORY-PAYMENT OBLIGATIONS DUE FIRST-DAY-OF-MONTH AFTER OCT2024 THROUGH DATE:2025-01-19 MAY CONTINUE ∧ FUNDS AVAILABLE  
SEC.112: CIVILIAN-PERSONNEL COMPENSATION/BENEFITS FUNDS(SEC101) MAY BE APPORTIONED UP TO OPERATIONS RATE TO AVOID FURLOUGHS ∧ CONSISTENT WITH FY2024 APPROPRIATIONS ACT ∧ ONLY AFTER DEPT/AGENCY REDUCE/DEFER NON-PERSONNEL ADMIN EXPENSES  
SEC.113: FUNDS UNDER THIS ACT MAY BE OBLIGATED/EXPENDED ∧ ¬APPLY SECTION10[PL91–672;22U.S.C.2412] ∧ ¬APPLY SECTION15[SDAA1956;22U.S.C.2680] ∧ ¬APPLY SECTION313[FRAA1994-95;22U.S.C.6212] ∧ ¬APPLY SECTION504(a)(1)[NSA1947;50U.S.C.3094(a)(1)]  
SEC.114(a): AMOUNTS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE PREVIOUSLY DESIGNATED EMERGENCY(251(b)(2)(A)(i)) OR DISASTER RELIEF(251(b)(2)(D)) CONTINUE AS SUCH  
SEC.114(b): SECTION6[PL118–42;PL118–47] APPLIES TO AMOUNTS FROM SUBSEC114(a) AND SECS138/140/151 AS EMERGENCY  
SEC.114(c): AMOUNTS FROM DIVISIONB[PL117–159]; DIVISIONJ[PL117–58]; SECTION443(b)[DIVISIONG PL117–328] PREV DESIGNATED EMERGENCY BY CONCURRENT-BUDGET-RES CONTINUE TREATED AS SECTION103(b)[DIVISIONA PL118–5] AMOUNTS  
SEC.114(d): EFFECTIVE IMMEDIATELY UPON ENACTMENT ∧ REMAINS EFFECTIVE THROUGH DATE:2024-12-20
